overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \left| u (x) - u (y) \right| \leqslant \left| u (x) - u _ {B} \right| + \left| u (y) - u _ {B} \right| \\ \leqslant 2 C (n, p) R ^ {\gamma} \| D u \| _ {p} \quad \text { a.e. } (\Omega \cap B). \tag * {\square} \\ \end{array}

\begin{array}{l} | V _ {\mu} f (x) | \leqslant \int_ {\Omega} \rho^ {n (\mu - 1)} | f (y) | d y, \quad \rho = | x - y | \\ = \int_ {0} ^ {d} \rho^ {n (\mu - 1)} v ^ {\prime} (\rho) d \rho , \quad d = \mathrm{diam} \Omega \\ = d ^ {n (\mu - 1)} v (d) + n (1 - \mu) \int_ {0} ^ {d} \rho^ {n (\mu - 1) - 1} v (\rho) d \rho \\ \leqslant \frac {1 - \delta}{\mu - \delta} d ^ {n (\mu - \delta)} K \quad \text { by   (7.46). } \tag * {\square} \\ \end{array}
